## Embeddable block

A wiry figure in a long earth-toned coat, ink-stained cuffs, half-moon
spectacles pushed up on greying hair. Always with a leather portfolio
under one arm. Posture: slight forward lean, as if listening for
something.

## Clauses

- Ink-stained cuffs — signature visual continuity element across every
  panel.
- Half-moon spectacles pushed UP, not worn — reads as "thinking, not
  reading" at panel scale.
